notes.note_text: Full Fact rated this misleading. The 2003 case Starmer was involved in concerned whether asylum seekers who didn't claim asylum immediately on entry could access accommodation or financial support. https://fullfact.org/immigration/starmer-2003-court-case-asylum-benefits/
notes.evidence_rating: This is misleading. Mr Starmer was involved in a 2003 court case that specifically concerned whether asylum seekers who didn't claim asylum as soon as they entered the UK could get help from the government in the form of accommodation or financial support. Most asylum seekers could already receive accommodation and financial support before this case.
